# Farm Equipment Rental Website - Copilot Instructions

## Project Overview
A comprehensive farm equipment rental platform connecting farmers with equipment owners. Built with React and Vite for optimal performance and mobile-first responsive design.

## Progress Tracking
- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
- [x] Clarify Project Requirements - Farm equipment rental platform with React/Vite
- [x] Scaffold the Project - Created React components, pages, and context providers
- [x] Customize the Project - Built comprehensive UI with all requested features
- [x] Install Required Extensions - No additional extensions needed
- [x] Compile the Project - Dependencies installed successfully
- [x] Create and Run Task - Development server running at http://localhost:5173
- [x] Launch the Project - Application successfully launched
- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete - README and instructions completed
- [ ] Customize the Project
- [ ] Install Required Extensions
- [ ] Compile the Project
- [ ] Create and Run Task
- [ ] Launch the Project
- [ ] Ensure Documentation is Complete

## Key Features
- User dashboards for farmers and equipment owners
- Equipment booking system with calendar integration
- Transparent pricing system
- Review and rating system
- Real-time notifications
- Live chat support
- Educational resources
- Mobile payment integration
- Multi-language support
- GPS location services
- Interactive maps with animations
- Weather updates

## Tech Stack
- Frontend: React with Vite
- Styling: Tailwind CSS for responsive design
- Animations: Framer Motion
- Maps: Leaflet/Google Maps integration
- State Management: Context API or Zustand
- Authentication: JWT-based auth
- Payment: Stripe/PayPal integration
- Real-time: Socket.io for notifications and chat

## Development Guidelines
- Mobile-first responsive design
- Farming color scheme (greens, browns, earthy tones)
- Simple, intuitive navigation
- Accessibility compliance
- Performance optimization for rural internet connections
